description: Body, form, regeneration, symbiosis, and physical transformation.
traits: Regenerating Limbs
Severed limbs grow back mid-fight, and the pieces left behind keep moving on their own. Previous victims' weapons jut from constantly regrowing flesh.
Living Hive
Its body crawls with smaller creatures nesting inside, spilling out to scout and defend. A trail of insects marks every path it has walked.
Crystalline Blood
It bleeds liquid crystal that hardens on contact, leaving jagged formations wherever it is wounded. Beautiful and valuable, but lethal to harvest.
Unstable Form
Its body shifts between solid, liquid, gas, and plasma without warning. The environment warps around each transformation, and nothing it does is predictable.
Living Weapon Symbiosis
The weapon fused to its hand has a mind and hunger of its own. Neither can be parted from the other, and the blade grows stronger with every kill.
Wound Collector
Every injury it has ever suffered is preserved like a trophy in its flesh. It remembers every attacker, and can open old wounds on new victims.
Swarm Consciousness
One mind spread across many bodies, holding conversations with itself. It experiences everything simultaneously, but suffers when its pieces are pulled too far apart.
Healing Overdriver
Healing magic goes haywire in its presence, turning restoration into cancerous overgrowth of tissue and bone. Healers fear it more than any blade.
Storm Heart
A living tempest trapped in a body. Its mood changes the weather for miles, and communities either beg for its calm or blame it for the drought.
Dimensional Stomach
Its belly opens into a pocket dimension vast enough to swallow whole buildings. What goes in rarely comes back out the same, if it comes back at all.
Sound Eater
It feeds on noise, leaving trails of unnatural silence behind it. Music, laughter, conversation, all devoured. The louder the world, the stronger it grows.
Inverse Healer
Damage restores it while healing tears it apart. It begs to be struck and flees from gentle hands. Clerics terrify it more than any warrior.
Silence Breaker
It cannot survive in quiet. A constant cacophony pours from it, and silence is the only thing that causes it real pain.
